name: snowman95-marketplace
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace for skills and plugins shared across machines

plugins.name: ticket-workflow
plugins.description: Non-trivial implementation workflow: Phase 0~5 (context loading → research → plan → annotation cycle → checklist → implementation). Jira-ticket-based by default, supports generic mode without a ticket.

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Matt Pocock's engineering & productivity skills (diagnose, tdd, triage, grill-with-docs, handoff, write-a-skill, etc.)

plugins.name: md-to-slides
plugins.description: Convert any markdown file into a Figma Slides presentation. Analyzes document structure and generates 6-10 dark-themed slides with layout variety.

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Claude Code setup utilities: statusline showing model, context %, token usage, and rate limits with color-coded progress bars.

plugins.name: show-schedulers
plugins.description: Show all custom launchd agents and crontab entries in a unified table on macOS.

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Remotion agent skills for AI-powered video creation with React. Includes best practices for animations, rendering, and Remotion-specific patterns.
